title: Image
sourceTitle: Image Description Highly Detailed Photorealistic Image Stunning
prompt: "image_description": "A highly detailed, photorealistic image of a stunning young woman with tanned skin, straight black hair, and striking facial features with bold makeup and glossy lips. She stands confidently in front of a warm yellow wall with a metal railing, wearing a red long-sleeve deep V-neck top and tight high-waisted blue denim shorts. She poses playfully with her arms crossed under her chest and her tongue sticking out, winking with one eye. Bright natural sunlight creates strong highlights and golden tones on her skin and hair.",   "composition": "Medium full-body portrait shot with a slight low angle, capturing her playful expression, figure, and outfit against the simple architectural background. Warm, vibrant golden hour lighting with soft shadows.",   "details": {     "woman": "Beautiful woman in her early-to-mid 20s, toned build, voluminous black hair, expressive eyes, confident and playful expression.",     "clothing": "yellow long-sleeve deep V-neck top, high-waisted tight blue denim shorts.",     "environment": "Outdoor setting against a plain dark wall with metal railing, bright natural daylight.",     "props": "Large colorful statement earrings."   },   "modifications": {     "additions": [       "Add a small, elegant embroidered sign reading 'Keor' in delicate cursive script on the visible border or hem of her white top or denim shorts. Use fine white or metallic thread that blends naturally as a subtle, high-end custom detail.",       "Transform the background wall into a large, dramatic Goya-style mural painting. The huge artwork should feature iconic Francisco Goya elements like a woman with a dark beautiful woman, strange creature, apocalyptic vibes, or strange dark scenery, rendered in his signature stencil street-art style with bold black outlines and vibrant accents, covering most of the visible wall behind her."     ]   },   "style": "Photorealistic, high-resolution fashion/lifestyle photography, warm golden sunlight, sharp focus on the subject, realistic fabric textures, skin details, and curly hair volume. The background mural should feel like authentic dark art integrated seamlessly into the scene.",   "technical": {     "resolution": "8K",     "aspect_ratio": "portrait",     "quality": "Extremely detailed black hair strands, skin texture with sun glow, fabric details on top and shorts, realistic embroidery, and high-fidelity Goya-style mural in the background."   },   "full_prompt": "Photorealistic portrait of a beautiful woman with black hair wearing a red deep V-neck long-sleeve top and denim shorts, playfully sticking her tongue out and winking in front of a yellow wall, add subtle embroidered 'Keor' on the border of her top or shorts, huge dramatic Goya mural against war and for love covering the background wall --ar 2:3 --v 6 --q 2 --stylize 250" }
